white.description: Pure white — used for light mode surfaces, text on dark backgrounds, and transparent overlay base.

white_a80.description: White at 80% opacity — frosted glass and backdrop blur effects in light mode.

white_a60.description: White at 60% opacity — subtle glassmorphism overlay for card surfaces.

white_a20.description: White at 20% opacity — placeholder and hint text on dark backgrounds.

white_a0.description: Fully transparent white — gradient feathered edge start point for bar backdrops.

black.description: Pure black — OLED-optimized dark mode gradient base.

black_a80.description: Black at 80% opacity — strong dark mode backdrop scrim for modal overlays.

custom_21_20_23_a70.description: Near-black with warm undertone at 70% opacity — dark mode card gradient glassmorphism overlay.

50.description: Lightest gray — subtle page background tint and modal surface in light mode.

100.description: Light gray — secondary surfaces, chip backgrounds, and inner modal subsections in light mode.

300.description: Mid-light gray — primary body text in dark mode for comfortable reading.

500.description: Dark-surface adapted medium gray — solid equivalent of the prior 80% gray fill on gray.900, preserving the same perceived emphasis without alpha dependence.

400_a8.description: Gray at 8% opacity — ultra-subtle divider and border on dark surfaces.

400_a40.description: Gray at 40% opacity — secondary text and de-emphasized icon color on dark backgrounds.

400_a80.description: Gray at 80% opacity — primary icon stroke and secondary button fill on dark surfaces.

800.description: Deep dark gray — elevated card and modal section surface in dark mode.

850.description: Deeper dark gray — secondary gradient stop for dark mode page background depth.

900.description: Near-black gray — primary dark mode surface, matches iOS system black.

950.description: Darkest near-pure-black — OLED-optimized tab bar backdrop gradient end.

950_a0.description: Transparent near-pure-black — gradient feathered edge start for dark mode tab bar backdrop.

800.description: Deep navy — branded hero gradient end stop for dark mode main background.

900.description: Darkest navy — primary text, icon, and fill color in light mode for maximum contrast.

900_a8.description: Navy at 8% opacity — ultra-subtle card edge border and separator in light mode.

900_a20.description: Navy at 20% opacity — placeholder and empty state hint text in light mode.

900_a40.description: Navy at 40% opacity — secondary text, captions, and de-emphasized icons in light mode.

50.description: Near-white blue tint — general page gradient start color in light mode.

100.description: Very light blue — main hero gradient end color in light mode.

200.description: Pale blue — XAUT card gradient accent and secondary gradient stop.

500.description: Brand blue — primary action color, links, and interactive element affordance signal.

600.description: Dark-surface adapted brand blue — solid equivalent of the prior 80% blue on gray.900, preserving the same perceived action emphasis without alpha dependence.

500_a80.description: Brand blue at 80% opacity — softened action color adapted for dark mode surfaces.

4.description: 4px spacing step for compact internal gaps and thin offsets.

8.description: 8px spacing step for tight row gaps and small vertical rhythm.

12.description: 12px spacing step for field padding and compact list gaps.

16.description: 16px spacing step for standard container padding and section insets.

20.description: 20px spacing step for medium content separation.

24.description: 24px spacing step for larger intra-section gaps.

32.description: 32px spacing step for section-level separation and action groups.

40.description: 40px spacing step for large content separation.

42.description: 42px spacing step preserved from observed layout offsets in the design system.

72.description: 72px spacing step for large top offsets such as modal content separation.

4.description: 4px structural size for very thin controls such as drag handle height.

16.description: 16px structural size for compact icons and small square affordances.

20.description: 20px structural size for small status-row icons.

24.description: 24px structural size for standard compact controls and icons.

32.description: 32px structural size for compact control heights and square icon buttons.

36.description: 36px structural size for compact horizontal control elements such as modal drag handle width.

40.description: 40px structural size for large list icons and prominent square affordances.

44.description: 44px structural size for touch-friendly compact control heights.

48.description: 48px structural size for field heights and medium touch controls.

52.description: 52px structural size for primary button height.

56.description: 56px structural size for secondary mobile navigation height and medium bars.

62.description: 62px structural size for observed token list row height pending further design review.

64.description: 64px structural size for tall compact containers and touch targets.

68.description: 68px structural size for web navigation height.

90.description: 90px structural size for primary mobile navigation height.

343.description: Canonical compact container width retained in the primitive size scale.

356.description: Canonical container width retained in the primitive size scale.

375.description: Canonical mobile frame width retained in the primitive size scale.

1200.description: Canonical wide web container width retained in the primitive size scale.

sm.description: Shared small radius token. Exact value is intentionally left unverified until confirmed from source design data.

md.description: Shared medium radius token. Exact value is intentionally left unverified until confirmed from source design data.

lg.description: Shared large radius token. Exact value is intentionally left unverified until confirmed from source design data.

full.description: Shared fully rounded radius token. Exact value is intentionally left unverified until confirmed from source design data.

general.description: Primary app background in light mode — pure white for maximum contrast and visual clarity.

card.description: Card surface background in light mode — white creates clean elevated content areas.

modal.description: Modal container background in light mode — slightly off-white to create perceived depth above the page.

modal_section.description: Modal section panel background in light mode — white for a flat, clean inner content area.

modal_section_inner.description: Inner modal subsection background in light mode — light gray to visually group and differentiate nested content.

backdrop.description: Backdrop blur overlay behind modals in light mode — 80% white for a frosted glass effect.

core.description: 页面核心信息内容，比主文字B的饱和度更高，也避免了整体页面过于沉闷的色值搭配。核心信息例如balance金额，明细金额，页面大抬头等

primary.description: 适用于对应于次标题的主标题等。但该标题尚未到页面核心信息的地位

secondary.description: Supporting and secondary text in light mode — 40% navy for captions, metadata, and sublabels.

action.description: Interactive action text in light mode — brand blue to signal links, CTAs, and affordance.

placeholder.description: Placeholder and empty state hint text in light mode — 20% navy at minimum readable contrast.

icon_primary.description: Primary icon stroke color in light mode — full navy for strong, legible icon rendering.

icon_secondary.description: Secondary icon stroke in light mode — 40% navy for de-emphasized, supporting icons.

default.description: Default border and divider in light mode — 8% navy, ultra-subtle separator for cards and list rows.

icon_chip.description: Icon chip background in light mode — light gray pill for icon-and-label chip components.

secondary.description: Secondary solid fill in light mode — full navy for secondary buttons and badge backgrounds.

tertiary.description: Tertiary fill in light mode — white for ghost buttons and outlined element backgrounds.

logo.description: Logo fill color in light mode — navy ensures brand identity is clear on white surfaces.

color_1.description: Generic brand color fill slot 1 in light mode — white, flexible placeholder for branded fills.

color_2.description: Generic brand color fill slot 2 in light mode — white, secondary flexible branded fill placeholder.

general.description: General page gradient — near-white blue tint to light gray for soft background depth.

main.description: Main hero gradient — near-white blue to light blue for branded hero section depth.

xaut_card.description: XAUT card gradient — 60% white glassmorphism to pale blue accent.

bar_backdrop.description: Tab bar backdrop gradient — transparent white to solid white for feathered top edge.
